name: Bettermode API
description: Bettermode (formerly Tribe) is a community platform that provides a GraphQL API for building custom apps, automating workflows, synchronizing data, and extending community functionality. The API supports operations for members, posts, spaces, analytics, authentication, moderation, and more.
